---
title: "poc"
author: "smd"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---



Setup
```{r}
setwd("~/GitHub/csv_scd2")
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(logger)
library(digest)

# makes log text colourful
log_layout(layout_glue_colors)
```

hashing function to facilitate easy comparisons 
```{r}
hash_kv <- function(df_in, key_cols) {
  all_cols <- df_in %>%  colnames()
  value_cols <- setdiff(all_cols, key_cols)
  
  if (length(all_cols) == length(value_cols)) {
    log_fatal("The key columns do not exist in the table!")
  } else {
    df_out <- df_in %>% 
      unite("key_combined", all_of(key_cols), sep = "|", remove = FALSE) %>% 
      mutate(key_hash = sapply(key_combined, digest, algo = "sha256")) %>% 
      unite("value_combined", all_of(value_cols), sep = "|", remove = FALSE) %>%
      mutate(value_hash = sapply(value_combined, digest, algo = "sha256")) %>% 
      select(-c(key_combined, value_combined))
  
    return(df_out)
  }  
}

```


```{r}
test_data <- read_csv("test_all.csv", show_col_types = FALSE) %>% 
  clean_names()

pre_historic_data <- test_data %>% 
  filter(between(id, 1, 10))

pre_load_data <- test_data %>% 
  filter(between(id, 11, 20))

# need to check for column match before proceeding
# - does historic have the effective and expiry date columns, current flag, hashes???
# - does the load table have the matching columns for the historic


keys <- c("name")

historic_data <- hash_kv(pre_historic_data, keys)
load_data <- hash_kv(pre_load_data, keys) 







all_data <- bind_rows(historic_data, load_data)


historic_hashes <- historic_data %>% 
  select(key_hash, value_hash)  %>% 
  mutate(effective_date = ymd("1111/01/01")) %>% 
  mutate(expiry_date = ymd("9999/12/31"))

load_hashes <- load_data %>% 
  select(key_hash, value_hash) %>% 
  mutate(load_date = ymd("2222/01/01"))

# check for hash uniqueness in load key values !!!!!!!!!!

```


```{r}
new_hashes <- anti_join(load_hashes, historic_hashes, by = join_by(key_hash, value_hash))

capped_hashes <- new_hashes %>% 
  select(key_hash, load_date) %>% 
  left_join(historic_hashes, ., by = join_by(key_hash)) %>% 
  mutate(expiry_date = if_else(is.na(load_date), expiry_date, load_date - days())) %>% 
  select(-load_date)

out <- new_hashes %>% 
  rename(effective_date = load_date) %>% 
  mutate(expiry_date = ymd("9999/12/31")) %>% 
  bind_rows(capped_hashes, .) %>%
  left_join(., all_data, by = join_by(key_hash, value_hash)) %>% 
  arrange(name, effective_date) 
  
```
